## Summary
AI Backend Engineer and AI SDE specializing in backend systems, distributed architectures, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) applications, and agentic AI workflows. I am also exploring Forward Deployed Engineer roles that combine backend depth, customer context, and end-to-end ownership.

## About

### Past
I completed my B.Tech in Information Technology from Uka Tarsadia University in 2026 with a clear focus on backend engineering, where I found the challenge of designing reliable systems more interesting than building user interfaces. I then spent around 9 months as a Backend Developer Intern at Logicwind, building production applications with Node.js and TypeScript. I worked across monolithic and microservice architectures, developing REST APIs, integrating third-party services (Dittofeed, Reoon, OneSignal), optimizing performance, and contributing to systems used by real users. That experience taught me that production engineering is about more than writing code — it's about building services that are reliable, observable, and maintainable when things don't go as planned.

### Present
Right now I'm building the AI layer — the backend infrastructure that makes AI products actually work in production, not just in demos. A full RAG pipeline with Gemini embeddings and pgvector (live on this portfolio — ~10k blog/project chunks indexed, ~300ms query time), a WhatsApp automation system in production handling 1k+ messages/week for a local business, and an AI ticket-triage pipeline running on Kafka and BullMQ with full OpenTelemetry observability. I'm continuously strengthening my backend engineering skills by building scalable systems with NestJS, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, and distributed architectures, while expanding into AI backend development through hands-on projects. The common thread: not experimenting with AI as a side interest — building the backend infrastructure that makes AI features ship, scale, and stay honest.

### Future
I'm headed toward Forward Deployed Engineering — the role that puts backend depth directly in front of customers, where the problem isn't fully defined when you walk in the room and ownership means end-to-end, not just the ticket in the queue. FDE is where the craft I've been building actually compounds: the ability to read a customer's real constraint faster than a spec document captures it, to prototype a working solution in the same conversation, and to own the gap between what the product does and what the customer needs it to do. Concretely: I'm targeting roles at companies where AI is the product, not a feature — where being the engineer closest to the customer is the high-leverage position, not the fallback. Applied AI Engineer, Forward Deployed AI Engineer, Solutions Engineer, Founding Engineer — the title varies, but the shape of the work is the same: bring the technical depth, translate the customer problem, ship the solution.

- Agentic AI & AI Agents

- Embeddings
- pgvector (vector similarity search)
- Vercel AI SDK
- Prompt Engineering
- Context grounding / hallucination control

- Event-driven systems
- Authentication (JWT, OAuth, RBAC)
- Rate limiting & security hardening
- Background job processing
- WebSockets / real-time systems
- API design (REST & GraphQL)

## Projects

### AI Portfolio RAG Chatbot (built 2025)
- Production RAG system powering portfolio assistant
- ~10k chunks indexed across blogs, projects, and about pages
- Gemini embeddings + pgvector semantic search (~300ms query latency)
- Designed to reduce hallucinations via grounded retrieval
- Live at: https://samir-portfolio-dev.vercel.app

### AI Ticket Triage System (built 2025)
- Microservices-based architecture
- Kafka + BullMQ event processing
- Observability with OpenTelemetry + Prometheus + Grafana

### WhatsApp Campaign Platform (built 2025, in production for real SME)
- Node.js + automation system for business messaging workflows
- 1k+ messages/week throughput for an active local business
- WhatsApp Web automation via whatsapp-web.js

### Eventify Platform (built 2025)
- Full-stack event management system
- GraphQL API with PostgreSQL + React frontend

## Work Experience

### Backend Developer Intern
Logicwind — Sep 2025 to May 2026
- Engineered new features and led legacy package migrations across 3+ active microservice and Firebase-based codebases, reducing technical debt and improving system maintainability.
- Integrated third-party services (Dittofeed, Reoon, OneSignal) into existing backend systems, shipping marketing automation, email verification, and push notification capabilities in live products.
- Built and maintained backend services across microservice, monolithic, and serverless architectures.
- Collaborated cross-functionally in an Agile environment — sprint planning, code reviews, and debugging.
- Optimized existing APIs and backend workflows by profiling bottlenecks and refactoring integration patterns, reducing response latency.

## Career Goals
Primarily targeting AI Backend Engineer, AI SDE, and Agentic AI Engineer roles. I am especially interested in roles that require customer-facing problem solving, comfort with ambiguity, and ownership from discovery to deployment. Heading toward Forward Deployed Engineering longer-term.

Open to remote and India-based roles.
